command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "cat > /tmp/pull_qwen.py << 'PYEOF'
import urllib.request, json, time
req = urllib.request.Request(
    'http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/pull',
    data=json.dumps({'name': 'qwen3.5:9b', 'stream': False}).encode(),
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
)
print('Starting pull of qwen3.5:9b (6.6GB)...')
try:
    r = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=600)
    result = json.loads(r.read())
    print('Result:', result.get('status', result))
except Exception as e:
    print('Error:', e)
PYEOF
nohup python3 /tmp/pull_qwen.py > /tmp/pull_qwen.log 2>&1 &
echo pull_pid=$!"
